content: Built index.html: full self-contained dino runner — Canvas 2D renderer (day/night cycle at 700pts), IDLE/RUNNING/GAME_OVER state machine, dino RUN/JUMP/DUCK/DEAD, 4 cactus variants + pterodactyls at 500pts, AABB collision with forgiveness pad, Web Audio SFX (jump/death/milestone chime), 5-digit score + HI-score with milestone flash, Space/ArrowUp/ArrowDown/tap input, hi-score persisted to localStorage. No external deps — open index.html directly in Chrome.
